---
title: "Mixed Shift Modes Test"
papersize: us-letter
format:
  typst:
    keep-typ: true
_quarto:
  tests:
    typst:
      ensureTypstFileRegexMatches:
        - ['shift: false', 'shift: auto', 'shift: "avoid"', 'shift: "ignore"']
        - []
      ensurePdfTextPositions:
        - # Positive assertions
          - subject: "FIXED"
            relation: above
            object: "AUTO"
          - subject: "AUTO"
            relation: above
            object: "AVOID"
          - subject: "AVOID"
            relation: above
            object: "AUTO 2"
          - subject: "FIXED"
            relation: rightOf
            object: "Line 1"
        - # Negative assertions - IGNORE overlaps AVOID, so NOT below
          - subject: "IGNORE"
            relation: below
            object: "FIXED"
      noErrors: default
---

This tests all shift modes interacting in a single document.

Line 1 [FIXED]{.column-margin shift="false"}.
Line 2 [AUTO]{.column-margin}.
Line 3 [AVOID]{.column-margin shift="avoid"}.
Line 4 [IGNORE]{.column-margin shift="ignore"}.
Line 5 [AUTO 2]{.column-margin}.
